message:
fix(pool): avoid u128->u64 as-cast on coalesced-reconstruct age_ms

Replace `age.as_millis() as u64` in the reconstruct-coalesce log
emission with `u64::try_from(age.as_millis()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX)`.
Semantically identical — `age` is bounded above by
`RECONSTRUCT_COALESCE_WINDOW` (10 s) so `age_ms` always fits in
u64 — but expresses the saturation explicitly to satisfy the
clippy lint that flags truncating `as` casts on `u128`.
Also add a short comment above the cast pinning why the
saturating fallback is safe here, so a future refactor that
widens the window doesn't silently introduce clamping.
